description: Artifact filtering thresholds for EEG data quality control - Updated with empirical data from meditation.csv

changelog.v6: Added contact quality and motion thresholds based on meditation.csv analysis

multiband_spike.description: dB spike across multiple bands simultaneously

impossible_combo_alpha.description: Alpha percentage threshold for impossible combinations

impossible_combo_beta.description: Beta threshold for impossible combo detection

extreme_shift.description: Total dB change across all bands threshold

simultaneous_bands.description: Number of bands spiking to trigger artifact detection

contact_quality.description: Contact quality thresholds based on meditation.csv analysis (TP9: 9.30, AF7: 9.55, AF8: 9.81, TP10: 8.99 at p95)
contact_quality.source: Empirical analysis of 4566 samples from meditation.csv

motion.description: Motion artifact thresholds based on accelerometer magnitude analysis
motion.source: Empirical analysis of 3799 samples from meditation.csv (mean: 0.998 ± 0.004)
motion.recommended: Use p99_threshold (1.0085) for meditation sessions, robust_threshold (1.0168) for active use
